name: Agent Status
description: Exposes GET /v1/agents/status returning live agent status with last active time, status classification, and current task

activeThresholdSeconds.description: Seconds since last activity to consider an agent 'active' (default: 300 = 5 minutes)

idleThresholdSeconds.description: Seconds since last activity before an agent becomes 'stale' (default: 1800 = 30 minutes)
